hooks.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "Set-Location C:\workspace\ai-daily-news; $s = & git status --porcelain 2>&1; if ($s) { & git add site/ pipeline/ README.md CLAUDE.md .github/ 2>&1 | Out-Null; $c = & git diff --cached --name-only 2>&1; if ($c) { & git commit -m 'auto: apply changes' 2>&1 | Out-Null; & git push 2>&1 | Out-Null } }"
